name: Citi® / AAdvantage® Executive World Elite Mastercard®

welcome_offer.description: Elevated offer: earn 100,000 American Airlines AAdvantage bonus miles after spending $10,000 in purchases within the first 3 months of account opening.
notes: Doctor of Credit July 2026 coverage shows a 100,000-mile elevated Executive offer after $10,000 spend in 3 months.
Citi and AA issuer pages may still show the standard 70,000-mile public offer; treat this as elevated/source-sensitive until issuer landing page matches.
source_conflicts: Official Citi/AA pages may show 70,000 miles after $7,000/3 months while DoC reports a 100,000-mile elevated offer.

earning_rates.notes: Earn 4 AAdvantage miles per $1 on American Airlines purchases
Earn 1 AAdvantage mile per $1 on all other purchases

lounge_access.name: Admirals Club®
lounge_access.notes: Primary cardmember and up to 2 guests; access to 100+ Admirals Club® and partner lounges worldwide (valued up to $850)

other_benefits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 every 5 years toward Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee

other_benefits.name: Companion Certificate
other_benefits.description: Annual companion certificate (requires $4,000 spend in anniversary year)

other_benefits.name: 10% AAdvantage Miles Redemption Bonus
other_benefits.description: 10% back on AAdvantage miles redeemed for award flights

other_benefits.name: First Bag Free
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardholder and up to 8 companions on domestic AA flights booked with the card

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Priority boarding on American Airlines flights

sources.notes: DoC July 2026 elevated 100k AAdvantage Executive offer.

recurring_credits.name: Avis / Budget Car Rental Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 in statement credits on eligible prepaid Avis and Budget car rentals booked directly on avis.com or budget.com.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee, every 4 years.
